paperTitle: LatBot: Distilling Universal Latent Actions for Vision-Language-Action Models
organization: Institute of Microelectronics, CAS / UCAS / Microsoft Research

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero goal 98.6 · libero object 98.8 · libero spatial 99 · libero 10 95.4 | Table 3 | Notes: 4 LIBERO suites, 50 demos/task, 50 rollouts per task

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 78 · google robot va 70.1 · widowx vm 87.5 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 96.7 · move near vm 91.7 · open close drawer vm 90.4 · place apple in drawer vm 33.3 · pick coke can va 95.7 · move near va 78.3 · open close drawer va 73 · place apple in drawer va 33.3 · put spoon on towel vm 95.8 · put carrot on plate vm 87.5 · stack green block on yellow block vm 83.3 · put eggplant in yellow basket vm 83.3 | Table 1, Table 2 | Notes: Standard SIMPLER VM/VA with Google Robot 4 tasks and WidowX 4 tasks
